title: Magnificently Moist Turkish Lamb Pide
description: A citrusy and indulgent Turkish dish featuring black treacle, with a silky texture and al-dente finish, perfect for a keto-friendly dinner option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat and cook the onion until softened.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the lamb mince and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Stir in the black treacle, lemon juice, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Arrange the pide bread on a baking sheet and spoon the lamb mixture onto each piece.
Top each pide with crumbly feta cheese and bake in the oven for 15 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
